user_story: As an HR admin, I want to indicate that an email id is set up to accept job applications, so that inbound applications can be imported into the talent pool
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Talent Pool Email screen; When I answer Yes to "Do you have an email id setup to accept job applications ?" and Save; Then application email import is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add email server settings, so that the system can connect to the mailbox and import applications
acceptance_criteria: Given application email import is enabled; When I click Add new email server settings and enter the server, username, port, encryption type, checking interval and timeout; Then the settings are saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to choose whether emails are deleted from the server after import, so that the mailbox stays manageable
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring Talent Pool Email; When I set "Do you want to delete emails from the server after importing them into talent pool ?" to Yes; Then imported emails are removed from the server

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable a notification when a candidate profile is not shortlisted, so that candidates are informed appropriately
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring Talent Pool Email; When I set "Do you want to send notification if candidate profile not shortlisted ?" to Yes; Then the notification is sent for non-shortlisted profiles

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the configured email server settings, so that I can confirm the mailbox connection details
acceptance_criteria: Given email server settings exist; When I open the list; Then each entry shows Email, Server, Username, Connection port, Encryption type, Checking interval and Server timeout
